title: Rebuttable presumptions
doc_html:
Art. 304.  Rebuttable presumptions

Presumptions regulated by this Chapter are rebuttable presumptions and therefore may be controverted or overcome by appropriate evidence.

Acts 1997, No. 577, §1.
